notes: US White House National Security Memoranda and other executive instruments with regulatory effect. The reference-type entry covers Executive Orders and OMB Memoranda; this regulation-type entry covers NSMs and similar directives that function as regulation.

data.description: The October 2024 National Security Memorandum on Advancing US Leadership in Artificial Intelligence; harnessing AI to fulfill national security objectives; and fostering the safety, security, and trustworthiness of AI.
